Test Case: Verify dashboard loads with correct financial metrics
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard (/)
2. Observe the financial metric cards
Expected Result: Total Sales, Total Purchases, VAT Payable, Collections, Expenses cards display with correct month-to-date figures

Pre-condition: At least 2 months of sales data exist
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Check Total Sales card trend indicator
Expected Result: Trend percentage shows correct increase/decrease compared to previous month

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Check project summary section
Expected Result: Active Projects count, Total Projects count, Budget vs Expenses % display correctly

Test Case: Verify approval queue cards show correct pending counts
Pre-condition: Pending approvals exist for various document types
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Check each approval queue card (Payroll, Advance Salary, Staff Loans, Material Requests, Project BOQ, Purchases)
Expected Result: Each card shows correct pending count matching actual pending approvals

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Click on an approval queue card (e.g. Material Requests)
Expected Result: User is redirected to the corresponding approval list page

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Scroll to Follow-ups section
Expected Result: Today's, Overdue, and Upcoming follow-up counts display correctly; list shows 20 most recent

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Click 'Export Follow-ups to Calendar' button
Expected Result: Calendar file (.ics) downloads with correct follow-up events

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Scroll to Project Activities Calendar section
Expected Result: Current month calendar displays with activities grouped by date; counts for Overdue, Today, Pending, In Progress shown

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Click next/previous month arrows on calendar
Expected Result: Calendar updates to show selected month's activities

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard as non-admin
2. Check activities calendar
Expected Result: Only activities assigned to current user are shown (not all activities)

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Check Active Project Schedules section
Expected Result: Schedules display with project name, progress bar, and status

Pre-condition: User with limited permissions is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Log in as user with restricted role
2. Navigate to Dashboard
Expected Result: Only metric cards and sections the user has permission to view are displayed
